metadata.title: Prompt Management
metadata.description: Customize system prompts to adjust the AI assistant's behavior and conversation style. Changes override system defaults and can be reset at any time.

agent_system.title: System Prompt
agent_system.description: Defines the AI assistant's persona, role, and behavioral guidelines. Affects the base behavior across all conversations.

agent_query.title: Query Prompt
agent_query.description: The query template for each conversation. Controls how user questions and knowledge base context are combined before being sent to the AI.

action.reset_confirm: Reset this prompt to system default?
action.reset_confirm_description: This will delete your customization and restore the built-in system default prompt.
